issue_title: [Bug] It is possible to add Systemd (Manual) services to the Server which has status Offline\Unknown
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
At this moment, it is possible to add systemd services to the server that have status Offline\Unknown

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:

_(I have not tested the scenario when I already have a real server added to Providers. If you have it, turn it offline and tr
test_description_zh: 在服务器列表中选择一个状态为 Offline 或 Unknown 的服务器，尝试为该服务器添加 Systemd (Manual) 服务，观察系统是否允许该操作。
expected_result_zh: 当服务器状态为 Offline 或 Unknown 时，系统应阻止用户添加 Systemd (Manual) 服务，相关的添加按钮应被禁用或点击后显示相应的错误/提示信息，不允许成功添加服务。
